zh.Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭素福爾可貝汀菲兒

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gundra de Musters於大約1124年出生在英國素福爾可貝汀菲兒時，她的父親Robert de Musters11歲，母親Mary de Rievers11歲。她於大約1165年與Stephen Malluvell在英國越可爾結婚。她去世於1194年之後。

zh-hans.Kirklington, Yorkshire, England, United: 英国英格兰越可爾吉可林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gundra de Musters于大约1124年出生在英国素福爾可貝汀菲兒时，她的父亲Robert de Musters11岁，母亲Mary de Rievers11岁。她于大约1165年与Stephen Malluvell在英国越可爾结婚。她去世于1194年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Musters
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Les Moutiers-Hubert (Calvados).

variants.name: Muster
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Hans, Bernhard, Heinz.
German: occupational name for a producer or seller of ‘most’, unfermented grape juice, fruit wine, from Middle Low German must, most, Middle High German most (see Most ).
Germanized form of Sorbian Mostar (see Moster ), a cognate of 4 below.

nameMeanings.name: Gundra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Gondri, Gundric, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans, composed of the ancient Germanic elements gund ‘battle’ + rīc ‘power(ful)’.

variants.name: Gundy
meanings: Found as a male name. Perhaps so called from being born on a Monday

variants.name: Grundy
meanings: English (Lancashire): from the Middle English personal name Grondi, Grundi, which is probably a metathesized form of Old French Gondri (ancient Germanic Gundric). See Gundry .

en.lifeSummary: When Gundra de Musters was born about 1124, in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, her father, Robert de Musters, was 11 and her mother, Mary de Rievers, was 11. She married Stephen Malluvell about 1165, in Yorkshire, England. She died after 1194.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gundra de Musters est née environ 1124, à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Musters, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Mary de Rievers, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen Malluvell environ 1165, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Elle est décédée après 1194.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gundra de Musters um 1124 in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Musters 11 und ihre Mutter Mary de Rievers 11. Sie hat um 1165 in Yorkshire, England Stephen Malluvell geheiratet. Sie starb nach 1194.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gundra de Musters è nata il circa 1124 nel Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Robert de Musters, aveva 11 anni e sua madre, Mary de Rievers, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Stephen Malluvell circa 1165, nel Yorkshire, England. Morì dopo il 1194.

ja.lifeSummary: Gundra de Mustersが約1124年にイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドで生まれた時，父Robert de Mustersは11歳，母Mary de Rieversは11歳であった。約1165年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでStephen Malluvellと結婚した。彼女は1194年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gundra de Musters(이)가 대략 1124년 영국 수폴크 베딩필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Musters(은)는 11세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Rievers(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 대략 1165년 영국 요르크실르에서 Stephen Malluvell(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1194년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gundra de Musters nasceu aproximadamente 1124, em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Musters, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Rievers, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephen Malluvell aproximadamente 1165, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu após 1194.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gundra de Musters родилась около 1124 г. в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Musters было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Rievers, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen Malluvell около 1165 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Она умерла после 1194 г.
